<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after game over
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("Current state after game over:")
for node in seg['nodes']:
    b = node['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={node['id']}, color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}, bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
print(f"\nStep: {current_frame.step}, Level: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"Last action result: {last_action_result}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
